Title: __max_notnull
Description: Returns maximum value among all its arguments, ignoring NULLs entirely.

The function returns the maximum value among all values in all its arguments by
  	ignoring NULLs entirely.
Examples:
SQL> select __max_notnull (null, 1, 0);
__max_notnull
VARCHAR
1
1 Rows. -- 16 msec.
SQL> select __max (null, 1, 0);
__max
VARCHAR
NULL
1 Rows. -- 0 msec.
